title: Add repo-native workflow operations and proposal linkage
summary: Add the next practical HumbleStudio workflow layer after onboarding: ticket id allocation, lane claim tooling, human-readable status rendering, a unified local checks wrapper, an explicit web fallback integrity verifier, and lightweight proposal-to-ticket linkage rooted in markdown artifacts.
acceptance_criteria: HumbleStudio can allocate the next free HS ticket id from repo-native ticket files.
HumbleStudio exposes explicit lane operation helpers and a start-ticket-lane entrypoint aligned with the fixed lane registry.
HumbleStudio exposes a reader-friendly repo status renderer on top of repo-owned status truth.
HumbleStudio has a unified local workflow checks wrapper and an explicit web fallback verification command.
Proposal artifacts can link back to HS tickets through repo workflow tooling and documentation without mutating source truth.

evidence.note: This slice intentionally batches the highest-value remaining workflow operations after comparing HumbleStudio with the closer HumbleControl and HumbleSudoku development flow.
Confirmed the next repo-native HS ticket id can be allocated automatically.
Confirmed the lane starter resolves the target ticket, branch, and lane without mutating git state.
Rendered the new human-readable repo status summary.
Verified static web fallback asset and markup integrity.
Confirmed the new unified workflow gate passes in the current repository state.
Validated the updated HS ticket set after adding workflow operations and proposal linkage.
Validated the updated repo contract surfaces and workflow documentation.
Compiled all workflow scripts after adding the new operational helpers.
Whitespace and patch hygiene checks passed for the workflow operations slice.

trigger.source_ref: Continuation of HumbleStudio repository workflow onboarding and parity work after the initial observability slice.

agent_notes: This slice keeps lane preparation explicit and dry-runnable instead of mutating git worktrees behind an implicit command.
Proposal linkage is currently repo-workflow-level truth through markdown ids and renderers; the next likely step is surfacing the same linkage inside native proposal inspectors.
